name: Shi Huan (Gongliu)
page_title: Shi Huan (Gongliu) 史渙 (公劉) [Wei] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
historical_notes:
Shi Huan, styled Gongliu, was one of Cao Cao’s earlier followers. In AD 199 he defeated Sui Gu, killed him, and took command of his soldiers. In AD 200 he joined with Xu Huang to destroy a supply convoy of Yuan Shao’s. He was given the trusted police office in the military and was enfeoffed. (1)

(1): de Crespigny, Rafe; Bibliographical History of the Three Kingdoms
novel_notes:
Differences Between Fact and Common Fiction
	
		
	Historically, he was not killed in a duel by Yuan Shang.

full_text:
Shi Huan (Gongliu) 史渙 (公劉)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Shi Huan (史渙), styledGongliu (公劉), was born in Pei. General of Xu Huang, captured messenger which gave them vital information. Shi Huan was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Shi Huan lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
